tree.text: Unit 4 Wonderful seasons - Listen and sing.
tree.cn: 第四单元 奇妙的季节 - 听一听，唱一唱。

children.text: Spring, summer, autumn and winter. Four seasons in a year.
children.cn: 春夏秋冬，一年中的四个季节。

children.text: Here comes spring. Flowers are all around.
children.cn: 春天来了。到处都是鲜花。
children.statement: “all around”在这个句子里表示“到处，周围”。
children.explanation: all around 表示在…周围或到处，这里指鲜花盛开在四周。

children.text: Here comes summer. It's so hot in the sun.
children.cn: 夏天来了。太阳底下真热。
children.statement: “in the sun”的意思是在太阳底下。
children.explanation: in the sun 是固定表达，意为“在阳光下”或“在太阳底下”。

children.text: Here comes autumn. The trees have so many colours.
children.cn: 秋天来了。树木有这么多色彩。
children.explanation: so many 用于修饰可数名词复数（如 colours），修饰不可数名词要用 so much。

children.text: Here comes winter. It's so much fun with ice and snow.
children.cn: 冬天来了。冰天雪地真好玩。
children.notes: so much fun: 非常有趣
children.explanation: fun 在这里是不可数名词，因此前面用 so much 来修饰，而不是 so many。

tree.cn: 启动 - 读一读，回答问题。

children.text: What's your favourite season, friends?
children.cn: 朋友们，你们最喜欢什么季节？

children.text: I like winter best. I can play in the snow.
children.cn: 我最喜欢冬天。我可以在雪地里玩。
children.explanation: like... best 相当于 favourite，意为最喜欢某事物。

children.text: I don't like winter. It's cold.
children.cn: 我不喜欢冬天。天气太冷了。

children.text: I like spring and autumn. They are beautiful.
children.cn: 我喜欢春天和秋天。它们很美丽。

children.text: I like summer best. I can eat ice cream.
children.cn: 我最喜欢夏天。我可以吃冰淇淋。

children.text: What about you, Lingling?
children.cn: 你呢，玲玲？

children.text: I like summer best, too.
children.cn: 我也最喜欢夏天。

children.text: Why do you also like summer?
children.cn: 你为什么也喜欢夏天？

children.text: Because my birthday is in summer!
children.cn: 因为我的生日在夏天！
children.statement: 在表示“在夏天”时，介词应该用“on”。
children.explanation: 在具体的某一天前用 on，而在季节、月份、年份前要用介词 in，如 in summer。

tree.text: Speed up - Li Han's apple tree
tree.cn: 加速 - 李汉的苹果树

children.text: I'm Li Han. This is my apple tree.
children.cn: 我是李汉。这是我的苹果树。

children.text: I'm ten now. The tree is ten, too.
children.cn: 我今年十岁了。这棵树也十岁了。

children.text: The changes of the apple tree in different seasons.
children.cn: 苹果树在不同季节的变化。

children.text: Spring is here! The birds are back.
children.cn: 春天来了！鸟儿们回来了。

children.text: It's summer. The apple tree is like a sun umbrella.
children.cn: 夏天到了。苹果树就像一把遮阳伞。
children.statement: 这里的“like”是动词，表示“喜欢”。
children.explanation: 这里的 like 是介词，表示“像……一样”，句意为“苹果树就像一把遮阳伞”。

children.text: I like reading under it.
children.cn: 我喜欢在树下读书。
children.notes: reading: 动名词形式，作like的宾语

children.text: It's autumn. I like autumn best!
children.cn: 秋天到了。我最喜欢秋天！

children.text: There are many red apples on the tree!
children.cn: 树上有许多红苹果！

children.text: Can I share the apples with my friends? Sure!
children.cn: 我可以和我的朋友们分享苹果吗？当然可以！

children.text: It's winter. My apple tree has warm, new clothes!
children.cn: 冬天到了。我的苹果树穿上了保暖的新衣服！

children.text: A snowstorm comes.
children.cn: 一场暴风雪来袭。

children.text: Oh, no! My apple tree! I don't like winter!
children.cn: 哦，不！我的苹果树！我不喜欢冬天！

children.text: Don't worry. Let's wait for spring.
children.cn: 别担心。让我们等待春天吧。

children.text: It's spring again. My apple tree grows again.
children.cn: 又是春天了。我的苹果树再次生长了。

children.text: Hooray!
children.cn: 万岁！

tree.text: Fuel up - Seasons around the world
tree.cn: 增能 - 世界各地的季节

children.text: Up here it's summer.
children.cn: 在我们这儿是夏天。
children.notes: Up here refers to the northern hemisphere when it is summer.

children.text: Go to the beach. Jump in the sea!
children.cn: 去海滩吧。跳进大海里！

children.text: On the equator, there is no winter.
children.cn: 在赤道上，没有冬天。
children.statement: “equator”这个单词的开头发音包含“q”的音标元素。
children.explanation: equator 包含字母组合 qu，发 /kw/ 的音。

children.text: It's a hot, hot summer, all year round.
children.cn: 全年都是炎热的夏天。
children.notes: all year round: 全年，一年到头

children.text: Down here it's winter.
children.cn: 在我们这儿是冬天。
children.notes: Down here refers to the southern hemisphere when it is winter.

children.text: The weather's quite cold. Join us and play!
children.cn: 天气非常冷。加入我们一起玩吧！
children.notes: quite: 非常，十分; join: 参与，加入

tree.text: Fuel Up Activity 3: Listen and Write (Dialogue)
tree.cn: 增能活动 3：听一听，写一写（对话）

children.text: Mary: Hello, Leilei! Cody: Hi, Cody! Leilei: Hi, Mary!
children.cn: 玛丽：你好，蕾蕾！科迪：嗨，科迪！蕾蕾：嗨，玛丽！

children.text: Wow, the flowers are beautiful. Are you in a park?
children.cn: 哇，花儿真漂亮。你在公园里吗？

children.text: Yes, it's spring here! It is a good time to enjoy flowers.
children.cn: 是的，我这里是春天！现在是赏花的好时节。
children.notes: enjoy flowers: 赏花，享受花卉带来的快乐

children.text: Oh, yes. It's autumn here in my city.
children.cn: 噢，是的。在我居住的城市现在是秋天。

children.text: Where are you now, Leilei? I can see many oranges.
children.cn: 你现在在哪里，蕾蕾？我看到了许多橙子。

children.text: I'm in my grandpa's garden, and I'm here to help grandpa pick oranges.
children.cn: 我在我爷爷的果园里，我来这里帮爷爷摘橙子。

children.text: Lucky you! In my city, it's summer all year round. I want winter!
children.cn: 你真幸运！在我居住的城市，全年都是夏天。我想要冬天！

children.text: But you can play in the water every day, Cody!
children.cn: 但是你每天都可以在水里玩呀，科迪！
children.keywords: play in the water, every day
children.notes: play in the water: 在水里玩
